data.title: Sanken Electric Unveils Advanced MCU for Power Electronics Control
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Sanken Electric Co., Ltd. ( (JP:6707) ) has issued an update.

Sanken Electric Co., Ltd. has announced the development of a cutting-edge microcontroller unit (MCU) for power electronics control, utilizing TSMC’s advanced 22ULL RRAM technology and featuring a RISC-V CPU core. This development aims to significantly enhance the efficiency and functionality of power control systems. Scheduled for mass production in Q4 2025, the MCU will enable high-performance processing of power control algorithms, supporting applications in micro-controlling units, IoT, and automotive sectors. The collaboration with TSMC underscores Sanken’s commitment to innovation and provides a strategic advantage in the global market for power electronics systems.

More about Sanken Electric Co., Ltd.

Sanken Electric Co., Ltd., headquartered in Niiza City, Saitama Prefecture, specializes in the development and production of advanced power electronics control technology. The company focuses on providing innovative semiconductor devices and solutions for power systems, leveraging partnerships with industry leaders like TSMC to enhance the efficiency and functionality of power control systems globally.

YTD Price Performance: 0.45%

Average Trading Volume: 195,462

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen140.7B

Learn more about 6707 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: NAOS Ex-50 Opportunities Declares Dividend Amidst Losses but Sees Positive Future
data.description:

  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

NAOS Ex-50 Opportunities Co. Ltd. ( (AU:NAC) ) just unveiled an update.

NAOS Ex-50 Opportunities Co. Ltd. has declared a fully franked quarterly dividend of 1.50 cents per share for the quarter ending December 2024, which translates to an annualised dividend yield of 15.38%. Despite recording an after-tax loss of $2.68 million for the same period, the company is optimistic about future performance due to stabilising customer demand, cost initiatives, and potential macroeconomic improvements. The company remains committed to shareholder value through dividends, an active share buyback program, and a Share Purchase Plan that raised approximately $2.4 million.

data.title: China Tower Announces Share Consolidation and Capital Reduction for 2025
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

China Tower ( (HK:0788) ) has issued an update.

China Tower Corporation Limited announced that its proposed share consolidation and capital reduction will become effective on 20 February 2025, following approval from the Listing Committee. The changes will affect trading arrangements, share certificates, and the company’s Articles of Association. The consolidation aims to streamline the company’s share structure by reducing the total number of shares from 176 billion to 17.6 billion. This strategic move is expected to optimize the company’s capital structure and potentially enhance shareholder value.

More about China Tower

China Tower Corporation Limited, a joint stock company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China, operates in the telecommunications infrastructure industry. The company primarily focuses on providing tower and related services to major telecommunications operators such as China Mobile, China Unicom, and China Telecom.

data.title: Veem Ltd Reports Decline in Revenue and Net Profit for 2024 Half-Year
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest update is out from Veem Ltd ( (AU:VEE) ).

Veem Ltd reported a 10% decrease in revenue from ordinary activities, totaling AUD 35,559,000, and a 71% decline in net profit to AUD 1,018,000 for the period ending December 31, 2024, compared to the previous year. Despite the financial downturn, the company declared an unfranked interim dividend of AUD 312,270, representing approximately 30% of the net profit after tax for the half-year, showcasing a commitment to returning value to shareholders amidst challenging market conditions.

More about Veem Ltd

Veem Ltd is a company that operates in the manufacturing industry, primarily producing and supplying precision engineering products. The company’s market focus includes sectors such as marine, aerospace, defense, and industrial markets.

Average Trading Volume: 126,064

Osisko Gold Royalties ( (TSE:OR) ) has shared an update.

Osisko Gold Royalties Ltd announced a first quarter 2025 dividend of C$0.065 per common share, payable on April 15, 2025, to shareholders of record as of March 31, 2025. data.title: InPlay Oil Corp. Acquires Pembina Cardium Assets in Major Expansion Move
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

InPlay Oil Corp. ( (TSE:IPO) ) has provided an announcement.

InPlay Oil Corp. has announced a strategic acquisition of light oil assets in the Pembina area from Obsidian Energy Ltd. for approximately $309 million. This acquisition is set to significantly increase InPlay’s production capacity and operational synergies, with over 100% increase in production and a 170% increase in light oil output, strengthening their shareholder return profile and free funds flow, while maintaining low decline, long-life reserves.

More about InPlay Oil Corp.

InPlay Oil Corp. is a company operating in the oil and gas industry, primarily focusing on the production of Cardium light oil. They are active in the Pembina area of Alberta, seeking opportunities to enhance their market presence and production capabilities.
